[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001000100 2
1 110110011 6
2 010000010 2
3 111011111 8
4 101010000 3
5 110011001 5
6 000000000 a
7 111010100 5

01 10 111000000 3
12 21 001000000 1
23 32 000000000 a match 6

45 54 010000010 2 match 2
56 65 101010000 3 match 4
67 76 100010000 2
70 07 110010000 3

02 20 001000100 2 match 0
13 31 110100011 5
24 42 000000000 a match 6
35 53 110010011 5
46 64 000000000 a match 6
57 75 110011001 5 match 5
60 06 101010000 3 match 4
71 17 110000001 3

03 30 110010000 3
14 41 010000010 2 match 2
25 52 001000100 2 match 0
36 63 100010000 2
47 74 010000000 1
50 05 111010100 5 match 7
61 16 101000000 2
72 27 000000000 a match 6

15 51 111000011 5
26 62 001000000 1
37 73 110010001 4
